# Release Note Template

> **Audience**: all users reviewing a release.
> **Fact source priority**: source code > config/CLI > tests/examples > existing docs > diff > external docs.

## Version [X.Y.Z] — [YYYY-MM-DD]

### Highlights

<!-- 1-3 sentence summary of the most important changes. -->

### New Features

- **[Feature name]**: brief description. See [link to doc].

### Improvements

- **[Area]**: what improved and why it matters.

### Bug Fixes

- **[Bug description]**: what was wrong, what was fixed. Ref: #issue.

### Breaking Changes

<!-- If none, state: "No breaking changes in this release." -->

### Deprecations

<!-- If none, state: "No deprecations in this release." -->

### Known Issues

<!-- If none, state: "No known issues." -->

### Upgrade Notes

<!-- Any special steps required when upgrading from the previous version. -->
